title: Implement cache-layer for CorePower schedule responses
description: Currently scraping live on every run. Implementing a JSON cache layer in the workspace could reduce CorePower load and speed up schedule retrieval when the site is slow or returns 429s.

title: Add backup scrape target for Regal movie times
description: Adding a secondary source for Regal (e.g. Google Search or Fandango page) would ensure resilience if the main Regal theatre page layout changes again.

title: Improve error handling for browser node disconnection
description: Currently logging to file. Enhancing this to auto-retry reconnection attempts for browser MCP specifically (with exponential backoff) would reduce manual intervention needs.
